rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code homestead exemption amount has no relation to Educ. Code §38.0152, which governs an ad hoc committee on food allergy anaphylaxis guidelines for schools.
quote: Sec. 38.0152. COMMITTEE TO ASSIST IN UPDATING GUIDELINES FOR CARE OF STUDENTS AT RISK FOR ANAPHYLAXIS.
_note: No conflict; the rule_text concerns school health guidelines and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
